body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. Go test TestFederatedBeadCreate_ForwardsToOwner proves hub beadCreate for a spoke project persists on the spoke and not locally.","coverage":"Child 1 AC1 (TestFederatedBeadCreate_ForwardsToOwner)"},{"parent_ac":"2. Go test TestFederatedBeadUpdate_ForwardsToOwner proves edits are forwarded and returned in hub federated reads.","coverage":"Child 1 AC2 (TestFederatedBeadUpdate_ForwardsToOwner)"},{"parent_ac":"3. Go test TestFederatedBeadLifecycle_ForwardsAuditMetadata proves approve/block/cancel/reopen preserve lifecycle events plus origin/forwarding metadata.","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 (TestFederatedBeadLifecycle_ForwardsAuditMetadata)"},{"parent_ac":"4. Go test TestBeadMutation_ProjectIsolation proves local project A writes do not leak into project B.","coverage":"Child 1 AC3 (TestBeadMutation_ProjectIsolation)"},{"parent_ac":"5. Playwright beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts includes create, edit, lifecycle, federated write, and invalid-state refusal scenarios.","coverage":"Child 3 AC1 (e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts with all five TC-018 scenarios)"},{"parent_ac":"6. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test -short ./internal/server/graphql/... ./internal/bead/... ./internal/federation/... passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC5; Child 2 AC3 (both run the full go test -short gate); Child 3 AC3 covers the graphql subset for UI wiring"},{"parent_ac":"7. cd cli/internal/server/frontend \u0026\u0026 bunx playwright test e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts passes once UI wiring lands.","coverage":"Child 3 AC2 (bunx playwright test e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts)"},{"parent_ac":"8. lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC6; Child 2 AC4; Child 3 AC4 (lefthook run pre-commit in every child)"},{"parent_ac":"PROPOSED FIX: Return typed errors for stale state, missing required reasons/notes, non-owned targets, and offline/read_only spokes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4 (TestBeadMutation_ForwardingTypedErrors: stale/non-owned/offline) and Child 2 AC2 (TestBeadLifecycle_RequiredReasonTypedErrors: missing reasons/notes, non-owned, offline); Child 3 AC1 surfaces invalid-state refusals in the UI"}],"child_ids":["ddx-8029a375","ddx-2fa4ec4c","ddx-172970f9"],"rationale":"Split along the natural seams of the parent: (1) the core write path — beadCreate/beadUpdate owner forwarding plus project isolation and forwarding typed errors; (2) lifecycle mutations (approve/block/cancel/reopen) with event preservation and origin/forwarding audit metadata, reusing the owner-resolution path from child 1; (3) UI wiring plus the TC-018 Playwright spec, which can only pass once both backend beads land. Children 1 and 2 are independently testable Go-only changes; child 2 and child 3 depend on child 1's shared owner-forwarding path, and child 3 depends on both backend beads. Every parent non-scope item (no new lifecycle states, no dependency-edit UI) and both governing artifacts (FEAT-021:353, TP-002:340/TC-018) are carried into each child."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
